summary: DAI API - Failed calls during stream playback does not result in a video error - 24/7 RSN
description:
GIVEN a 24/7 linear stream has adsEnabled equals true in the graphql Preview/Response (data->initPlaybackSession->adExperience->adsEnabled)
AND a cmsId and a videoId is returned in the same graphql Preview/Response (data->initPlaybackSession->adExperience->adEngineIdentifiers)

*NOTE:*
Enter graphql into the Network search of Dev Tools to find the initPlaybackSession

steps.action:
WHEN the user initiates playback of a 24/7 RSN feed
AND network calls to "[dai.google.com|http://dai.google.com]*" are blocked
OR network calls to "[dai.google.com|http://dai.google.com]*" are failing
steps.result:
THEN the stream continues to playback with no video error modal popping up
AND ads playback during ad breaks
